overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a video game showing a character walking through a wooden gate into a rural cemetery at night, approaching a small white chapel while holding a torch. The scene features dark atmospheric lighting with warm torchlight illuminating the path and gravestones.

events.description: passing through the wooden gate frame into the cemetery grounds

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the wooden gate entrance into the dark cemetery

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with crossbeam framing the entrance
wooden plank fence running along the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail leading through the gate

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a large wooden gate structure at night. The gate frames a dark opening leading into a cemetery, with wooden fencing visible along the right side. The character walks forward and passes through the gate threshold into the grounds beyond.

events.description: character raises torch into left side of frame, illuminating the path and gravestones with warm light

agents.ego_description: walking along the path through the grassy cemetery toward the white chapel, holding a torch that sways slightly with each step

entered.detail: small white chapel with dark roof and cross on top, visible in the distance
wooden cross-shaped grave marker standing in the grass
stone cross gravestone with weathered texture
dark silhouettes of trees surrounding the cemetery

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open cemetery, the camera advances toward a small white chapel visible ahead. Scattered wooden and stone crosses mark graves throughout the overgrown grassy grounds. The character holds a torch that illuminates the path with warm light as they approach the chapel, while the wooden gate recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the threshold of a dark entrance into the heart of a moonlit rural cemetery. It begins by approaching a large wooden gate structure at night, passing through the dark opening and leaving the wooden fencing behind. As the camera advances into the grounds, the scene opens up to reveal scattered wooden and stone crosses marking graves across overgrown grass. The perspective then shifts toward a small white chapel visible in the distance, with the warm glow of a handheld torch illuminating the path forward. The movement concludes as the wooden gate recedes into the background and the chapel looms larger in the atmospheric darkness.
